summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Kali Dham Guest House static HTML website (7 pages). All core pages load correctly with proper navigation, WhatsApp floating button, navbar, and content.
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery filter shows 'Showing 25 photos' for Rooms — visually correct but note images displayed include some Puri temple images first (index 1-2 appear to be Puri category not rooms) — verify category assignments in gallery JS

Booking page: the 6-step stepper mentioned in requirements is actually 5 steps (Fill form → Email confirmation → Payment → Invoice → Arrive) on the info panel — verify if 6th step exists on rooms.html stepper or if the count was updated
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 pages tested and working. Homepage: Swiper hero, sticky navbar, WhatsApp button, Book Now all functional. Gallery: 91 images, 5 filter tabs (All, Rooms, Sea View, Facilities, Puri) all working, filter shows 25 photos for Rooms. Booking form: submits and shows green success message. Contact form: submits and shows success message. Google Maps embedded on contact page. About page: Rajib Dutta, Bapi Majumdar, Kasinath Debnath team cards visible. Amenities: 12 cards + distance table. WhatsApp button present on all tested pages with correct link (wa.me/919831492081). All navigation links work.

pages_tested.index.html: PASS - Hero slider (Swiper), navbar, WhatsApp button, Book Now link all working
pages_tested.rooms.html: PASS - Page loads with room type cards (AC Deluxe Room visible), stepper found, WhatsApp button present
pages_tested.amenities.html: PASS - 12 amenity cards found, distance table present, WhatsApp button
pages_tested.gallery.html: PASS - 91 images loaded via JS, 5 filter tabs working (Rooms shows 25 photos)
pages_tested.about.html: PASS - Story, 3 team cards (Rajib Dutta, Bapi Majumdar, Kasinath Debnath), 1977 content
pages_tested.booking.html: PASS - 2-column layout, form submits with green success message
pages_tested.contact.html: PASS - Google Maps iframe, Puri address, Kolkata office, form success message
